_doc: OUT-side adapters for the diversity atlas. An action declares how POST /api/actions resolves a (type, target, params) triple to a runner module that produces raw outputs the dispatcher then hands to an extractor. Mirrors atlases/inversion/registries/data/actions.registry.json. Each entry: { runner: 'runners.<module>.<callable>', schema_in: '<v1 schema id>', description }. Schemas live at registries/schemas/schema_in/<schema_in>.schema.json.

import_slot.description: Capture one of the five diversity slots (GET /api/diversity/{slot}) as a staging_diversity_slot_v0 layer. Source endpoint: atlas-core/server/diversity_endpoint.py. Existing action — kept for the api_client + handoff tests.

harvest_file.description: Resolve a layer_key + per-layer args (e.g. sample_id, K, cohort, win_bp) against master_config roots, copy the on-disk file into raw_results/diversity/{action_id}/, and return its path. The dispatcher then dispatches to the matching extractor declared on the layer. This is the IN-side adapter glue that lets the browser request a typed layer envelope for any file declared in layers.registry.json with source=file. Supersedes import_slot for non-API on-disk inputs.

run_realsfs.description: PLANNED. Server-side wrapper around `realSFS -fold 1 <sample>.saf.idx` to (re)produce {sample}.est.ml. Requires the SAF binaries (.saf.idx + .saf.gz + .saf.pos.gz) to be present on the server's local filesystem — see MISSING_DATA.md §1. Runner module not yet written.

run_thetastat.description: PLANNED. Server-side wrapper around `thetaStat do_stat <prefix> -win <win_bp> -step <step_bp>` to (re)produce a {sample}.win{N}.step{M}.pestPG file at an arbitrary scale beyond the four pre-baked. Requires the per-sample .thetas.idx + .thetas.gz emitted by `angsd -doThetas` upstream of doThetaStat. Runner module not yet written.

aggregate_pi.description: PLANNED. Cross-sample aggregator that combines per-sample pestPG files (samples_theta_pi_pestpg) into a cohort θπ track at a requested scale. Pure-Python compute (no engine); persist: true so the result is cached at _cache/server_results/aggregate_pi/{hash}.json. Targets the 05_aggregated/ output directory on disk — see MISSING_DATA.md §3.
